response.justification: The candidate brings 20 years of software engineering experience exceeding the 15-year requirement and is actively working on AI-agent infrastructure (MCP) at re:cinq, directly addressing the AI focus. However, the resume lacks evidence of director-level strategic impact, formal AI/ML credentials (no Master's or PhD), and demonstrated AI products or platforms. The AI infrastructure work is recent and promising but insufficient alone for a Director-level specialized AI strategy role.
strengths: 20 years of software engineering across full-stack, cloud, and infrastructure—well exceeds experience requirement
Current role working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP aligns with job's AI and innovation focus
Founder of GISCollective demonstrates ability to build from scratch and drive technical innovation independently
concerns: No evidence of director-level strategic leadership or organizational impact—roles are Senior/Staff level without demonstrated strategic influence at scale
Missing preferred qualifications: no Master's degree or PhD in AI, and no demonstrated AI products or platforms built
Limited depth in AI/ML beyond recent MCP work—no research, publications, or track record of specialized AI expertise

key_factors.factor: Recent AI-agent infrastructure work with MCP
No formal AI/ML education or demonstrated AI products
